title: Eyliden Heavy Duty Broom, Commercial Angle Broom with Long Handle, Rough Surface Outdoor Broom for Garages Courtyard Sidewalks Decks, Perfect for Indoor Kitchen Office Lobby Sweeping
features: Heavy Duty Broom with Special Split-end Bristle Technology: The split-end bristle configuration increases the surface area for cleaning, making the broom more effective at gathering and trapping particles. This design ensures a thorough clean with every swipe, reducing the time and effort needed for tidying up.

Versatile for Indoor and Outdoor Use: The heavy duty broom is designed to handle a variety of surfaces and environments. The broom works equally well on indoor floors, including hardwood, tile, and laminate, as well as outdoor surfaces like garden, yard, garage, patios, driveways, and sidewalks.

45-Degree Angle Brush for Corners: The sweeping broom head is angled at 45 degrees, allowing for easy access to corners and edges. This ergonomic design enables you to clean those hard-to-reach areas without straining your back or hands.

Outdoor Broom with Adjustable Long Handle: With a 57-inch long handle that can be adjusted to your preferred length, the broom offers maximum comfort and convenience. The adjustable feature allows you to customize the handle length to suit your height and cleaning style, making it suitable for users of all heights. The broom is also easy to store and transport without taking up too much space.

High Quality and Easy to Assemble: 14.1" sweeping width, 3-layer strong PET memory bristles won’t weaken or break during tough cleaning jobs, resist bending and hold their shape. The sturdy construction ensures durability and longevity, even with frequent use. The sweeping broom allows you to set it up with ease without any tools.
description: From the brand Eyliden Begin with Heart, Move with Action! Listen to your voices with all our hearts, create better cleaning products with you! Previous page Why Choose Eyliden? Each Eyliden product is designed with you in mind — from user-centric features to sustainable materials — ensuring that your cleaning tasks are efficient, effective, and environmentally responsible. Join us in creating a cleaner, more sustainable future, one product at a time! Floor Cleaning Tools Floor Cleaning Tools Floo Cleaing Tools Next page
